series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of warrants which were sent out to claimants, doctors, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The BWC receives this record as machine readable from the Treasurer of State and maintains it for a period of 7 years. The Treasurer of State also maintains a “Redeemed Warrants” website for a period of 7 years from the date a warrant was presented for payment., Electronic: Delete
